title: Neon Nexus
description: A high-octane cyberpunk RPG with tactical combat and deep character customization. Explore a neon-drenched city where every choice shapes your destiny.
learned: Mastered complex state machine systems for tactical combat and implemented advanced lighting techniques for the cyberpunk aesthetic.

title: Shadow Realm
description: Fast-paced shadow-themed platformer with unique light/dark mechanics. Navigate through treacherous levels using your ability to manipulate shadows.
learned: Developed a custom 2D lighting engine and integrated dynamic audio systems to enhance the atmospheric gameplay.

title: Void Walker
description: Psychological horror game set in a shifting space station. Experience a haunting atmosphere and mind-bending puzzles in this narrative-driven adventure.
learned: Led a team of 4 developers to build a cohesive narrative experience. Managed asset pipelines and optimized real-time volumetric effects.
